notes: Real LinkedIn applies font-size:0.625em on root container, making computedStyle fontSize report fractional px (e.g. 6.25px = 10px*0.625). Treat real fontSize 6.25px as 'inherited rem scale' and sandbox 14px/12px as 'absolute px' — this is a real fidelity gap (rem vs px) but expected to look ~similar because LI then applies bigger sizes upward.

header.position: real=static sandbox=fixed — real LI scrolls header off-screen, sandbox sticks
header input.borderRadius: real=999px (pill) sandbox=4px (rounded square)
header input.bg: real=transparent sandbox=#edf3f8 filled gray
header a[mynet].x: real=738 sandbox=798 — entire nav icon row shifted +60px right in sandbox

leftRail.display: real=block sandbox=flex
